component.name: IA Helper
component.summary: Search and download from the Internet Archive

description.p: IA Helper simplifies searching for and downloading items and collections from the Internet Archive (archive.org). It operates within the Internet Archive's usage guidelines: it identifies itself, limits concurrent connections, and caches metadata and thumbnails locally.
Milestone 4: packaging. Flatpak builds work out of the box with pinned dependencies; Debian packaging added.
Fix slow thumbnails on repeat searches: stale thumbnail fetches from the previous result set are now dropped instead of blocking the new ones.
"Select all" now skips DRM-protected lending files; they remain individually selectable and downloadable.
Label DRM-protected lending files (ACS/LCP encrypted PDF and EPUB) in the file list so downloads that need a loan to open aren't a surprise.
Honor access restrictions: restricted items (e.g. lending-library books) are flagged in search and on the item page, and their private files cannot be selected or downloaded.
Milestone 3: download manager with queue, pause/resume, checksum verification, persistence across restarts, and preferences.
Milestone 2: item view with metadata, description, collection and simple-list memberships, and a file list with selection.
Milestone 1: search with mediatype filter, thumbnails, paging.
